title: Knowledge Demon

moves.title: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Player chooses a status card to add

move_pattern: Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder (repeats). After Curse of Knowledge is used 3 times, it's removed from the cycle, leaving: Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder (repeats).
notes: Knowledge Demon has a 'burnt state' mechanic controlled by its attacks. Knowledge Overwhelming enters burnt state, while Ponder exits it. Curse of Knowledge cycles through 3 stages with different status card choices (player chooses which card to add to their deck). The Disintegration damage on Curse of Knowledge scales across stages (6→7→8). After the 3rd use of Curse of Knowledge, the move cycle removes it entirely, cycling only Slap, Knowledge Overwhelming, and Ponder for the remainder of the fight.
